frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; valid semver; description 585 chars (under 1024 ceiling); no angle brackets; allowed-tools hyphenated; argument-hint present and concrete; owns correctly empty; shared_read declared.

description_quality.notes: Action verb (Review), 10+ trigger variants, two-mode description. 585 chars overshoots 200-char target. References stale '100-line rule' instead of current 500-line/5000-word house style.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 143 lines / ~1149 words. All 3 references linked from body with when-to-read context. All references under 300-line TOC threshold.

instruction_clarity.notes: Two-mode dispatch crisp. Numbered phases (A1-A3, B1-B3) with imperative voice. Each phase explains WHY. Output Handoff provides user-facing message template.

coordination.notes: composes_with [skill-update, skill-writer] accurate. spawned_by empty correct for user-invoked. No ownership overlaps.

completeness.notes: All 3 reference files exist and well-structured. report-format.md provides exact output schema. deep-review-rubric.md has full 1-5 scoring. audit-checklist.md has both per-skill and ecosystem checks.

anti_patterns.notes: Guidelines actively prevent nitpicking. Imperative voice. No emojis. Mode A guards against over-reading. WHY explained for low-impact checks.

important.item: Description references stale '100-line rule' but house style is 500 lines
important.fix: Change '100-line rule' to '500-line/5000-word body guidelines' to match current standard.

nits.fix: Trim trigger-phrase list to strongest 5 variants; target ~400 chars.
Rename to 'Shared Phase: Report' or 'C: Report'.

nits.item: skill-creator referenced at L96 but not in composes_with
nits.fix: Add skill-creator to composes_with or document as external optional integration.

nits.item: Output path handling at L121 lacks concrete CLI example
nits.fix: Add example CLI flag form like --output=reports/.

top_fixes.fix: Update stale '100-line rule' reference in description to current 500-line/5000-word guideline
Trim description from 585 → ~400 chars by keeping strongest 5 trigger variants
Add skill-creator to composes_with (or document as external optional)
